debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
    apply propext
    constructor
    · intro h
      subst h
      show x.beq x = true
      unfold beq
      generalize hn : w - 1 = n
      induction n with
      | zero =>
          simp [beq.go]
      | succ n ih =>
          simp [beq.go, ih]
    · intro hb
      have hb' : x.beq y = true := by simpa using hb
      unfold beq at hb'
      have hgo :
          ∀ n, beq.go (w:=w) x y n = true →
            ∀ t, t ≤ n →
              x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - t) = y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - t) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
            intro hn t ht
            have ht0 : t = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero ht
            subst ht0
            simpa [beq.go] using hn
        | succ n ih =>
            intro hn t ht
            have hn' :
                (x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - (n + 1)) == y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - (n + 1)) &&
                    beq.go (w:=w) x y n) = true := by
              simpa [beq.go, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using hn
            have hAnd := Bool.and_eq_true.mp hn'
            have hbit :
                x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - (n + 1)) = y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - (n + 1)) := by
              simpa using hAnd.1
            have hrec : beq.go (w:=w) x y n = true := hAnd.2
            rcases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le ht with htlt | hteq
            · exact ih hrec t (Nat.le_of_lt_succ htlt)
            · subst hteq
              simpa using hbit
      ext i
      let j : Fin w := Fin.rev i
      have hj : j.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.le_pred_of_lt j.isLt
      have hD :
          x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j.val) = y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j.val) :=
        hgo (w - 1) hb' j.val hj
      have hjrev : Fin.rev j = i := by simp [j]
      have hij : (w - 1) - j.val = i.val := by
        simpa [Fin.rev] using congrArg Fin.val hjrev
      have hD' : x.getLsbD i.val = y.getLsbD i.val := by
        simpa [hij] using hD
      simpa [BitVec.getLsbD, i.isLt] using hD'
